reason_for_decision: The revised article now clears the strict pass threshold with enough depth on conditional RCS interpretation, operational meaning, and planning use while staying accessible to beginners.
strengths: The revised version now explains why published RCS values are shorthand rather than fixed target truths.
It adds practical sections on low-RCS interpretation, clutter interaction, and how engineers use RCS in planning.
The article remains beginner-friendly while offering more useful operational context than the initial draft.
summary_assessment: This version is strong enough to pass under the stricter workflow. It is clearer, deeper, and more decision-relevant without losing the accessibility expected from a foundation article.
